name: Post Process
summary: A Mars3D-style screen-space Cesium post-process effect for bloom, night vision, black-white, brightness, mosaic, and depth-of-field looks.
useCases: Showcase demos that need quick screen-space visual personalities

brightness.description: Brightness multiplier used by brightness mode.

contrast.description: Contrast multiplier used by brightness mode.

saturation.description: Saturation multiplier used by brightness mode.

minimal.code:
import { createPostProcessEffect } from '@ztgk/geo-effect-kit'

const postProcess = createPostProcessEffect(viewer, {
  type: 'night-vision',
  strength: 0.82,
  brightness: 1.4,
  contrast: 1.2,
  saturation: 0.6,
})

postProcess.update({ type: 'bloom', strength: 0.65 })
postProcess.destroy()

notes: Pass an existing Cesium Viewer; the SDK does not create or own the viewer.
The effect uses one reusable Cesium PostProcessStage and updates uniforms in place.
Use show() and hide() for temporary scene-mode switches.
Call destroy() during page cleanup to remove the post-process stage.
